data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Template MUST explicitly define the three escalation tiers: Tier 1 = sonnet dso:red-test-writer attempt. Tier 2 = on TEST_RESULT:rejected, dispatch dso:red-test-evaluator (opus) → REVISE/REJECT/CONFIRM. Tier 3 = on REJECT, retry with opus-tier writer. User escalation after retry failure or second REVISE. TEST_RESULT:rejected is NOT an infrastructure failure — it triggers the escalation protocol, not dispatch failure recovery.
